    MongoAction(@Nullable com.mongodb.WriteConcern defaultWriteConcern, MongoActionOperation mongoActionOperation, String collectionName, @Nullable Class<?> entityType, @Nullable org.bson.Document document, @Nullable org.bson.Document query)
    Create an instance of a MongoAction.
